title: Condensing Notifications
excerpt:
Preivously to our CRM the team had been putting together a daily sheet of stops, calls, etc. 
Is there a way to automate a daily email that would contain any and all changes to a specific users sales board?

posts.author: erikh42 (Erik Herz)
posts.cookedHtml:
